name: 11.3' Pillowtop Outdoor Fabric Hammock Summer Stripe Yellow/Red/Blue - Threshold™: Weather-Resistant, 2-Person Capacity
description:
Bring comfort and style to your outdoor space with this Summer Stripe Pillowtop Fabric Hammock from Threshold™. Made from weather-resistant fabric, the summer stripe pillowtop hammock comes with a heavy-duty hanging stand that offers reliable strength to hold up to 500 pounds. Affix this hammock between two trees or out on the back patio and kick back to read a novel, have a drink, take a nap or gaze at the stars.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
